arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s 3-1 victory over Augsburg has been overshadowed by a serious injury to wunderkind Jamal Musiala...and then there was the Thomas Müller exit . If signed into Google, you will be able to edit your vote.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: A home first-leg against Inter Milan will provide Bayern Munich with a chance to forge ahead in the teams' UEFA Champions League quarter-final meeting at this season's final venue, the Allianz Arena, on Tuesday (kick-off: 9.00pm CEST). That said, Vincent Kompany and his Bundesliga leaders - conquerers of Bayer Leverkusen in the last round - will be wary of looking past the 2023 finalists Inter, who are currently rekindling memories of a treble-winning team that disappointed the Bavarians at the final hurdle of this competition some 15 years ago.

arts.ttl: “Won’t be easy for either side” — Germany international assesses Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan in Champions League
arts.sum: After getting his first call-up to the German national team under Julian Nagelsmann, the 24-year-old will now face Bayern Munich in Champions League . We know very well we’re playing against a very strong team.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl talks tough decisions amid strategic planning; Manchester City views Florian Wirtz as “dream option”; Manchester United to overhaul roster?; Bayern to sell right-back?; Real Madrid wants midfielder; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl saw the most recent report on potential contract extensions for Leroy Sané, Sven Ulreich, and Eric Dier, plus a multitude of rumors involving other players including Leon Goretzka. The “dream” option for Manchester City this summer is Bayer Leverkusen attacking midfielder Florian Wirtz, reports Fabrizio Romano.
